rounds.prompt: How many times more caffeine is in a espresso than in green tea?
rounds.fact: Green tea has ~28 mg caffeine per cup; an espresso has ~63 mg per shot — about 2.25× more in a much smaller volume.

rounds.prompt: How many times more sugar does hard candy have than broccoli (per 100g)?
rounds.fact: Broccoli has ~1.7g sugar per 100g; hard candy has ~87g — 51× more. Broccoli is essentially sugar-free by comparison.

rounds.prompt: How many times more calories does butter have than cucumber (per 100g)?
rounds.fact: Cucumber has ~15 kcal per 100g; butter has ~717 kcal — nearly 48× more calorie-dense.

rounds.prompt: How many times stronger is Everclear than standard beer (by ABV)?
rounds.fact: Beer is ~5% ABV; Everclear is 95% ABV — 19× stronger. It is literally stronger than most surgical spirits.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a blue whale's heart than a human heart?
rounds.fact: A human heart weighs ~300g; a blue whale's heart weighs ~200 kg — about 666× heavier. It's the size of a small car.
